raw_reaction: 正しいが、有限配置の指数型生成関数として読む話は既存の種・Fock・大正準分配関数の見方にかなり近い。生涯忘れない別解とは言えない。
reason: The candidate correctly maps survival prefixes to ordered configurations and uses exponential generating measure normalization, but it largely restates existing species/Fock/grand-canonical configuration-space solutions and is not distinct enough for the exact target line.
